name: QA 1168
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1168

Exercise the pmrep with newly appearing BCC PMDA klockstat metrics.



Copyright (c) 2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform centos8 reproduce
